product_overview: Torca Wi‑Fi Analyzer is a cross‑platform Flutter app that provides real‑time Wi‑Fi scanning, security assessment, network discovery (nmap), monitoring and reporting. It combines live signal visualization, channel recommendations, and exportable reports with background monitoring and alerting.
core_goals: Provide reliable multi‑backend Wi‑Fi scanning with real‑time signal visualization and averaging
Deliver actionable security assessment per network (encryption type, rogue AP detection, handshake capture)
Integrate network discovery (nmap) and device/service fingerprinting for LAN risk analysis
Offer monitoring, historical trend analysis, and heatmaps with exportable reports (PDF/JSON/HTML)
Support background monitoring and flexible alerting channels (email, Telegram, webhooks) with a polished mobile UI

features.name: Wi‑Fi Scanning
features.description: Perform multi‑pass Wi‑Fi scans (iw/nmcli fallback), provide real‑time dBm updates, channel occupancy and BSSID/vendor info with scan session management.
user_flows: POST /api/wifi/scan/start with {interface:'auto',mode:'multi-pass',passes:3} -> Receive 202 with {scan_id} and backend_used -> GET /api/wifi/scan/{scan_id}/results -> Receive 200 with networks[],each {ssid,bssid,signal_dBm,channel,band,vendor,hidden} -> WS /ws/wifi/scan/{scan_id} -> Receive streaming signal strength updates for discovered BSSIDs
POST /api/wifi/scan/start with {interface:'eth0'} on device without wifi -> Receive 400 with error 'no_wireless_interface'
POST /api/wifi/scan/start with insufficient privileges -> Receive 403 Forbidden -> POST /api/wifi/scan/start with sudo_token -> Receive 202 with {scan_id}

features.name: Security Assessment
features.description: Analyze discovered networks for encryption type, rogue AP detection, deauth attack events, WPA handshake capture and produce per‑network risk scores.
user_flows: POST /api/wifi/security/assess with {scan_id} -> Receive 202 with {assessment_id} -> GET /api/wifi/security/assess/{assessment_id}/results -> Receive 200 with networks_security[] each {bssid,ssid,encryption,wpa_versions,rogue_score,handshake_captured,recommendation}
POST /api/wifi/security/handshake/capture with {bssid,timeout:60} -> Receive 202 with {capture_id} -> GET /api/wifi/security/handshake/{capture_id} -> Receive 200 with pcap_url for offline analysis
POST /api/wifi/security/assess with invalid_scan_id -> Receive 404 Not Found

features.name: Network Scanning (Nmap Integration)
features.description: Discover LAN hosts with ping sweeps and deep scans (fast/balanced/aggressive), run NSE scripts for vulnerability checks and return service/OS fingerprints.
user_flows: POST /api/network/scan with {targets:'192.168.1.0/24',profile:'balanced'} -> Receive 202 with {scan_id} and scheduled_by:'nmap' -> GET /api/network/scan/{scan_id}/results -> Receive 200 with hosts[] each {ip,mac,os,services,open_ports} -> GET /api/network/scan/{scan_id}/nse/list -> Receive 200 with available_nse_scripts[]

POST /api/network/scan with {targets:'10.0.0.5',profile:'aggressive',nse:['vuln-check']} -> Receive 202 with {scan_id} -> GET /api/network/scan/{scan_id}/nse/vuln-check/output -> Receive 200 with script_output and risk_findings
POST /api/network/scan when nmap binary missing on server -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable

features.name: Channel Recommendation Engine
features.description: Analyze channel occupancy and congestion across bands (2.4/5/6 GHz) and recommend optimal channels per AP or location with rationale.
user_flows: POST /api/wifi/channel/recommend with {scan_id,band:'2.4GHz'} -> Receive 200 with recommendations[] each {bssid,recommended_channel,score,explanation} -> GET /api/wifi/channel/recommendations/{bssid}/explain -> Receive 200 with detailed_occupancy_map
POST /api/wifi/channel/recommend with stale_scan_id older_than 10m -> Receive 409 Conflict with message 'scan_data_stale'
POST /api/wifi/channel/apply with {bssid,channel} -> Receive 200 with apply_status 'scheduled' or 403 if device/settings disallow remote channel changes

features.name: Monitoring & Analysis (Heatmaps & Throughput)
features.description: Collect and visualize historical signal heatmaps, real‑time throughput (TX/RX), topology maps and store sessions for trend analysis.
user_flows: GET /api/monitoring/heatmap?area_id=office_floor_1&period=24h -> Receive 200 with heatmap_tiles (geo referenced) -> GET /api/monitoring/heatmap/{tile_id} -> Receive 200 binary_tile_png

POST /api/monitoring/throughput/start with {interface:'wlan0'} -> Receive 202 with {session_id} -> WS /ws/monitoring/throughput/{session_id} -> Receive periodic {tx_bps,rx_bps,timestamp} updates -> POST /api/monitoring/throughput/{session_id}/stop -> Receive 200 with summary_report_id
GET /api/monitoring/heatmap?area_id=unknown -> Receive 204 No Content

features.name: Alerting & Notifications
features.description: Configure real‑time alerts for security events, anomalies or scan findings and deliver via email, Telegram or webhooks with rate‑limiting controls.
user_flows: POST /api/alerts/subscribe with {channels:[{type:'webhook',url:'https://hooks.example/endpoint'},{type:'telegram',chat_id:12345}],filters:{severity:'high'}} -> Receive 201 with {subscription_id} -> GET /api/alerts/{subscription_id}/status -> Receive 200 with enabled:true
POST /api/alerts/test with {subscription_id} -> Receive 200 and server will POST event payload to configured webhook -> Receive 200 at webhook endpoint
POST /api/alerts/subscribe with invalid_webhook_url -> Receive 422 Unprocessable Entity with validation_errors

features.name: Data Management & Report Generation
features.description: Export scan sessions and assessments to PDF/JSON/HTML, save sessions to local DB, import/export results and download generated reports.
user_flows: POST /api/reports/generate with {type:'scan_summary',scan_ids:[sid1,sid2],format:'pdf'} -> Receive 202 with {report_id} -> GET /api/reports/{report_id}/status -> Receive 200 with status 'ready' -> GET /api/reports/{report_id}/download -> Receive 200 with binary/pdf
POST /api/sessions/import with multipart file (scan_export.json) -> Receive 201 with {imported_session_id} -> GET /api/sessions/{imported_session_id} -> Receive 200 with session metadata
GET /api/reports/{nonexistent_id}/download -> Receive 404 Not Found

features.name: Dashboard (Mobile UI)
features.description: Aggregate overview page that surfaces recent scans, active alerts, recommended channels, and quick actions for scans and monitoring.
user_flows: GET /api/dashboard/overview with Authorization:Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with {recent_scans,active_alerts,top_recommendations,throughput_summary} -> GET /api/dashboard/widgets/scan_preview?limit=5 -> Receive 200 with scan_preview_list

GET /api/dashboard/overview without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/dashboard/overview with token -> Receive 200
